input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8867 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-actuator:3.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Spring Boot Actuator has many optional integration endpoints; tests that choose AMQP, Cassandra, servlet/reactive web filters, Jackson-heavy configuration-properties serialization, or Micrometer-specific paths may need additional dependencies, but core actuator coverage is reachable without them.
Generated tests must target Spring Boot 3 APIs, for example the httptrace endpoint/classes were renamed to httpexchanges/HttpExchange, and several endpoint constructors changed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable; the reported javac failures are Spring Boot 2.6 to 3.0 API drift, not missing setup.
